description: You are the e-commerce operations manager for an online retail store running on WooCommerce. Set up a complete 'Summer Flash Sale' promotion by creating a new product category called 'Flash Sale' and adding the 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones', 'Yoga Mat Premium', and 'LED Desk Lamp' products to it. Update these products with sale prices of $59.99, $29.99, and $34.99 respectively. Additionally, configure a coupon code 'FLASH30' as a 30% discount with a $50.00 minimum spend, a usage limit of 100, restricted to the 'Flash Sale' category, and an expiry date of 2026-12-31. Ensure all product changes and the coupon are published and saved.
